data.title: Moving Expert Ross Sapir of Manhattan, NY Explains Storage With Movers vs. Self Storage for HelloNation
data.description: In Manhattan, N.Y. on April 15, 2026, a recent article from HelloNation discusses the distinctions between mover-provided storage and self-storage. The decision ultimately hinges on the level of convenience, control, and security an individual seeks during a move. Analysis reveals that individuals often weigh their options based on these factors to determine the most suitable storage solution.

data.title: Scale Computing™ Launches Velocity Partner Program
data.description: The latest partner program emphasizes speed, transparency, and partner effectiveness. Scale Computing, a leading provider of edge computing and network solutions, unveiled the Scale Computing Velocity™ Partner program at the SC//Platform™ 2026 Summit in Las Vegas on April 15, 2026. The program is designed to enhance partner execution and offer clarity, aligning with the company's commitment to collaboration and success.

data.title: Plumbing Expert George Campbell of Rochester, NY, Explains Plumbing Code Requirements for HelloNation
data.description: In Rochester, N.Y. as of April 15, 2026, a discussion has arisen regarding the significance of plumbing codes for property owners undergoing home upgrades or renovations. Plumbing Expert George Campbell from GT Campbell Plumbing in Rochester shared insights on this topic in a recent article by HelloNation. This examination delves into whether property owners should take heed of plumbing codes amidst home improvements.

data.title: Adaptive ML Appoints Chief Marketing Officer and Chief Revenue Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth
data.description: Two experienced leaders have joined forces to expedite Adaptive ML's ascent as the leading platform for Enterprise Reinforcement Learning (RL). The development was announced in New York on April 15, 2026. Adaptive ML is focused on revolutionizing Enterprise Reinforcement Learning Operations and assisting major corporations in leveraging this technology.

data.title: RTX's Raytheon completes first flight test for RAIVEN® sensing system
data.description: Raytheon, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), based in ARLINGTON, Va., announced on April 15, 2026, that they have conducted the inaugural flight test of their RAIVEN® Staring system. The system is an advanced intelligent sensor providing enhanced situational awareness. Raytheon achieved this successful test for their air-cooled sensor suite, highlighting its superior capabilities.

data.title: Dr. Scott Schwartz Revives Lingual Braces Technology with the Launch of InSmile Braces
data.description: Dr. Scott Schwartz has successfully reestablished access to personalized lingual orthodontic treatment, prioritizing clinical effectiveness and precision while aiming for sustainability with reduced capital investment. The development in Fountain Valley, California on April 15, 2026, marks a strategic shift towards a more efficient and focused orthodontic system.

data.title: University of Phoenix Provost John Woods Discusses College Literacy and Academic Support at ASU+GSV Summit
data.description: A panel recently discussed how colleges address literacy and numeracy gaps in teaching and academic assistance at the 2026 ASU+GSV Summit in Phoenix on April 15. John Woods, Ph.D., the Provost and Chief Academic Officer at the University of Phoenix, was a part of this discussion. The summit highlighted strategies for improving instruction and academic support to help students overcome these gaps. It discussed various approaches and initiatives that educational institutions can take to enhance literacy and numeracy skills among students. The panel emphasized the importance of providing effective support to bridge these gaps in education.

data.title: One in Three Cigarettes in the Region of The Americas in 2025 Is Illicit, New Study Finds
data.description: Stamford, CT - Philip Morris International, listed on the NYSE as PM, highlighted the significance of sound policymaking to combat the rising illicit tobacco trade in the Region of the Americas (excluding the US). A study by KPMG LLP for Philip Morris Products S.A. revealed that nearly 1 in every 3 cigarettes consumed in 11 countries within the region originates from illicit sources. This underscores the prevalence of illicit trade in the area.

data.title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Sets First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Webcast
data.description: In NORWALK, Conn., EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The announcement is scheduled for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before the markets open. Alongside this revelation, EMCOR will conduct an earnings conference call and webcast to discuss the outcomes and its activities on the same day at 10:30 am EDT. The call, led by Chairman, President, and CEO Tony Guzzi, features insights into the company's operations.

data.title: Mountain Valley MD Announces Closing of Non-Brokered Private Placement of Units and Concurrent Shares for Debt Transactions
data.description: In Toronto, Mountain Valley MD Holdings Inc. (MVMD) has successfully completed a non-brokered private placement offering of units, generating CAD $2,000,000 in aggregate gross proceeds. Additionally, the company has executed two shares for debt transactions alongside the offering. MVMD's private placement involved the sale of units, while the Shares for Debt Transactions involved converting debt into shares. This financing initiative marks a significant development for MVMD as it secures funding for its operations and growth strategies.

data.title: Tilray Brands Accelerates Next Phase of Global Growth and Market Leadership
data.description: Tilray is making significant strides in enhancing its UK healthcare platform with the acquisition of Lyphe, which will help position BrewDog for robust growth. The company is also gearing up for possible rescheduling in the U.S., opening up new opportunities in the medical cannabis sector. These strategic moves underscore Tilray's commitment to expanding its presence and capitalizing on emerging market trends. Through these developments, Tilray is poised to capitalize on the growing demand for medical cannabis, with a focus on harnessing a potential market share.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Appoints Randy H. Goodman, PhD, MHA, as Vice President of Value Strategy & HEOR to Advance Market Access and Commercial Execution
data.description: A highly experienced health economics and reimbursement specialist with more than 20 years of expertise in payer strategy, value-based pricing, and health policy has joined the team to drive the adoption and long-term commercialization strategy of REYOBIQ™ within the CNSide market. The expert's wealth of knowledge will play a crucial role in shaping the reimbursement landscape and ensuring sustainable growth for the product.

data.title: Knight to Present at the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference
data.description: In Montreal on April 15, 2026, Knight Therapeutics Inc. (TSX: GUD) declared that Samira Sakhia, the President and CEO, will deliver a corporate update at the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference on April 21, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. ET. The event will take place at the Metro Toronto Convention Centre (North Building) in Toronto. Those interested can access the presentation at www.knighttx.com. Knight is a specialty pharmaceutical company operating in the pan-American (ex-US) region.

data.title: Arbutus Receives U.S. FDA Fast Track Designation for Imdusiran for the Treatment of Chronic Hepatitis B
data.description: The Fast Track designation has the ability to aid in the advancement and speed up the FDA review process of imdusiran, a promising therapeutic option. This designation is typically given to drugs addressing serious conditions with an unmet medical need, with the goal of expediting their development and approval. Fast Track status can lead to more frequent communication with the FDA during development, potential priority review, and could ultimately accelerate the availability of imdusiran for patients suffering from the specific medical condition it aims to treat.

data.title: Black Iron Announces Upsizing of LIFE Offering
data.description: This information is not intended for release to United States news agencies or for circulation in the United States.

data.title: BrainsWay Highlights Growing U.S. Payer Support for Nurse Practitioner-Administered Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) Therapy
data.description: The increasing willingness of payers to allow nurse practitioners to offer Deep Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (Deep TMS) is projected to enhance availability of non-pharmacological mental health therapies. This shift is anticipated to elevate access to treatment for a significant number of individuals seeking alternatives to medication for mental health conditions.

data.title: Ridgepost Capital Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release for Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: Dallas-based Ridgepost Capital, Inc. (NYSE: RPC) disclosed that it will unveil its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, prior to the opening of U.S. markets. Ridgepost Capital is renowned for its offerings in private markets and is a frontrunner in the sector. Stay tuned to witness the performance numbers of the company's first quarter in the current financial year.

data.title: DEEP SEA MINERALS CORP. APPOINTS ANTHONY ZELEN TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on April 15, 2026, Deep Sea Minerals Corp. (CSE: SEAS) (OTCQB: DSEAF) (FSE: X450) has appointed Anthony Zelen to its Board of Directors, marking a new addition while Barry Greene steps down. Deep Sea Minerals focuses on exploring and developing critical minerals from the deep ocean, with this change becoming effective immediately.

data.title: Prelude Therapeutics Announces the Appointment of Charles Morris, M.D. as Chief Medical Officer
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Wilmington, Delaware, Prelude Therapeutics Incorporated (Nasdaq: PRLD) revealed that Dr. Charles Morris would become their new Chief Medical Officer starting April 20, 2026. This marks a significant development for the clinical-stage precision oncology company.

data.title: POWELL MAX LIMITED ANNOUNCES 1-FOR-10 SHARE CONSOLIDATION EFFECTIVE APRIL 17, 2026
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Powell Max Limited (Nasdaq: PMAX), a financial communications services provider based in Boca Raton, FL, announced a 1-for-10 share consolidation of all outstanding ordinary shares. This action, effective as of April 17, 2026, aims to boost the market price per share of the Company’s Class A Ordinary Shares above the US$1.00 minimum bid price needed for ongoing listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The consolidation will be carried out in accordance with the Sixth Amended and Restated Memorandum and Articles of Association. Following this, the Class A Ordinary Shares will still trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol “PMAX” and will now have a new CUSIP Number: G7200G126.
